html:
Exclusive to:

“The Moon Crater dirt infused water will form Moon Glass crystals if the water is clear and the light is right.”

-

The Vitreoasis is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is common (and exclusively found) in Lunar Grotto biome.

The pool contains 3 Moon Glass structures, and each one can be mined for 2 Moon Shards, with a 50% chance of getting an extra one.

At each Full Moon, each mined Moon Glass have a 10% chance to reappear.

Small Vitreoasis

“The Moon Crater dirt infused water will form Moon Glass crystals if the water is clear and the light is right.”

-

The Small Vitreoasis is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is common (and exclusively found) in Lunar Grotto biome.

It is a smaller version of the Vitreoasis, only containing 1 Moon Glass structure.

Trivia

  • The Vitreoasis and Small Vitreoasis were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • Appears to be portmanteau of words "vitreous" and "oasis".
  • "Vitre" is a French word used for objects made of or possessing qualities of "glass".
  • Judging by many quotes, these glasses are formed due to water saturated with lunar dirt. In the Scrapbook entry for both Vitreoasis variants it is specified that this happens only in certain light.

Assets

  • Idle
  • Dry (unused)
  • pre (unused)
  • pst (unused)
  • wet (unused)

Gallery

  • Vitreoases in-game.
  • A view of them zoomed out in-game.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Vitreoasis
Source
Lunar Grotto
Resources
6-9
Miscellaneous
"grotto_pool_big"
“The moon water makes the glass grow. That's just science.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, this whole place is damp and gross! I hate it!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang would like to swim, but too much glass in the way.”
–Wolfgang
“A rare bit of beauty in this dark, dreary place.”
–Wendy
“NOWHERE IS SAFE FROM THE WRETCHED WATER”
–WX-78
“How interesting, it seems to be forming moon glass stalagmites.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks almost like icebergs.”
–Woodie
“Don't expect me to wade in there for some wretched moon glass.”
–Maxwell
“The pöols hath been enchanted.”
–Wigfrid
“Isn't it dangerous to have glass in the pool?”
–Webber
“My, how beautiful!”
–Warly
“Clear rock water”
–Wormwood
“Fancy a swim? Ha! Didn't think so.”
–Winona
“Perhaps it is home to a nymph.”
–Wortox
“Spiky water!”
–Wurt
“Sorry Woby, I don't think it'll be any good for swimming.”
–Walter
“It's not a pool I'd care to take a dip in.”
–Wanda
“The Moon Crater dirt infused water will form Moon Glass crystals if the water is clear and the light is right.”
-
The Vitreoasis is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is common (and exclusively found) in Lunar Grotto biome.
The pool contains 3 Moon Glass structures, and each one can be mined for 2 Moon Shards, with a 50% chance of getting an extra one.
At each Full Moon, each mined Moon Glass have a 10% chance to reappear.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vitreoasis là một vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together. Nó phổ biến (và độc quyền được tìm thấy) trong quần xã Lunar Grotto.
title: Vitreoasis

The '''Vitreoasis''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is common (and exclusively found) in [[Lunar Grotto]] biome.

The pool contains 3 [[Moon Glass]] structures, and each one can be mined for 2 [[Moon Shard]]s, with a 50% chance of getting an extra one.

At each [[Full Moon]], each mined Moon Glass have a 10% chance to reappear.
